items.question: What is KarirKit?
items.answer: KarirKit is a platform to manage your job search process in one place. It includes an Application Tracker, Cover Letters, CV Builder, Digital Portfolio, Documents, and Subscriptions.

items.question: What features are available in KarirKit?
items.answer: Main features include application tracking, cover letter creation, CV Builder, digital portfolio, document management, and subscription plans for additional access based on your needs.

items.question: How do I start using the Application Tracker?
items.answer: Go to the Application Tracker menu, then add company details, position, status, job source, contact, notes, and follow-up schedule. You can also use filters, stats, and bulk actions to manage your applications faster.

items.question: Do the CV Builder and Cover Letter support Indonesian and English?
items.answer: Yes. Both CV Builder and Cover Letter support Indonesian and English, including premium templates available through subscription plans.

items.question: Can I download and manage documents?
items.answer: Yes. CVs and cover letters can be downloaded in DOCX or PDF format and duplicated for different versions. In the Documents menu, you can also upload, search, filter, download, and delete files like PDF or DOCX.

items.question: How do I share my Digital Portfolio?
items.answer: Each portfolio can be made public with a unique slug and shared via a link. You can also add a cover, media gallery, tools used, live demo, and source code to make it more complete.

items.question: Do I need a subscription to start using KarirKit?
items.answer: No. You can start with the Free plan to use core features. If you need more access, you can upgrade to Pro or Max anytime from the Subscription page.

items.question: What do I get from the Subscription feature?
items.answer: Subscriptions offer Free, Pro, and Max plans with usage limits, premium template access, and additional capabilities like document management and higher limits. Payments are handled through a checkout flow integrated with Midtrans, and subscription status can be monitored from the Subscription page.

templateSlider.title: Professional designs, ready for your dream career!

testimonials.title: Hear from KarirKit Users
testimonials.description: Thousands of job seekers have benefited from KarirKit for their careers

items.name: Andi Wijaya
items.quote: I applied to 30+ companies and lost track of which ones had interviews. Since using KarirKit, everything is more organized, and the follow-up reminders really help.

items.name: Sari Wulandari
items.quote: Creating a CV layout on my own was really hard. Here, I just fill out a form, pick a template, and it’s done. Looks way better than what I used to make in Word.

items.name: Reza Pratama
items.quote: I’m looking for my first job and had no idea how to build a CV. The templates here are perfect for fresh grads, with sections for projects and campus activities.

items.name: Dinda Amelia
items.quote: Cover letters used to be a pain. Now I just pick a paragraph template, tweak it a bit, and it’s ready. Saves a lot of time!

items.name: Firman Hidayat
items.quote: I have quite a few projects but no personal website. With KarirKit, I now have a portfolio link I can share with recruiters. Love it!

items.name: Mega Kusuma
items.quote: I love the application tracking feature. I can see how many are pending or already interviewed. Helps me know where to follow up.

items.name: Fajar Nugroho
items.quote: I was hesitant at first, but it turns out many features are free. I can download CVs as PDF and cover letters too. Totally worth it!

items.name: Rika Sari
items.quote: I used Excel to track applications before—super complicated. KarirKit is much more practical, and the UI looks great.

items.name: Agus Setiawan
items.quote: I can create multiple CV versions for different roles—one for frontend, one for full stack. Very flexible.

items.name: Nina Anggraini
items.quote: The portfolio is simple but still looks professional. Clients can easily see my work through the link I share.

items.name: Bayu Kusnandar
items.quote: The follow-up reminder feature is super helpful. I used to forget when to follow up, now I get notified.

items.name: Dewi Lestari
items.quote: I was skeptical about online CV builders, but the downloaded result looks great—clean and ready to print or send.

items.name: Hendra Gunawan
items.quote: I can add GitHub links and project demos to my CV. Recruiters can check my skills right away.

items.name: Lina Puspita
items.quote: Templates are available in Indonesian and English. When applying abroad, I just switch the language—super practical!

items.name: Yoga Aditya
items.quote: The dashboard is clean and simple. All application info is clear—what’s pending and what’s already offering.

items.name: Putri Maharani
items.quote: I love the application stats feature. I can see my success rate and stay motivated to keep applying.

items.name: Arief Rahman
items.quote: The 10 downloads per day limit is enough for daily use. I rarely need more than that.

items.name: Sinta Permata
items.quote: No need to install anything—just open it in the browser. Works on both phone and laptop, and everything stays in sync.

items.name: Irfan Hakim
items.quote: Super useful while job hunting. All applications are recorded, including HR contacts. Easy to access anytime.

items.name: Ayu Rahmawati
items.quote: The cover letter templates look very professional. I just tweak them slightly for each role, and they’re ready.

application.title: Manage All Your Job Applications from One Dashboard
application.description: Record every job you apply to, track the process status, and keep follow-up details without switching to spreadsheets.
bullets: Track 15+ process statuses, from draft and submitted to interview, offering, accepted, or rejected
Store company details, position, job source, recruiter contact, follow-up dates, and important notes
Filter by status, job type, work system, date, location, company, and salary range

applicationletter.title: Create Ready-to-Send Cover Letters in Minutes
applicationletter.description: Choose a suitable template, fill in applicant and company details, use ready-made paragraphs, then download in DOCX or PDF format.
bullets: Cover letter templates in Indonesian and English, including premium options
Fill in personal info, education, target company, and contact details in one form
Use paragraph templates for opening, body, and closing for consistency
Add a digital signature, duplicate letters, then download as DOCX or PDF

cv.title: Build a Complete and Professional CV
cv.description: Organize your photo, summary, education, experience, skills, projects, and social links in a clean CV template.
bullets: CV templates in Indonesian and English, including premium options
Complete profile, photo, about, education, experience, skills, certificates, awards, organizations, projects, and social links
Set CV slug and visibility to private, public, or unlisted as needed
Share public CV via a unique link, then download as DOCX or PDF or duplicate for other versions

portfolio.title: Digital Portfolio to Showcase Your Best Projects
portfolio.description: Showcase work, freelance, personal, or academic projects in one public page with shareable details.
bullets: Public portfolio page with a unique slug ready to share
Add title, short description, project details, role, industry, and timeline
Include cover, media gallery, tools used, live demo, and source code
Suitable for work, freelance, personal, or academic projects
